title: Mexican Cauliflower Bowl
description: A flavorful and healthy Mexican-inspired cauliflower bowl recipe, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Rinse the cauliflower head and remove the leaves and stem.
Cut the cauliflower into florets and place them on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with 1 tablespoon of silky (tahini) and toss to coat.
Sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon of middle eastern (cumin) and 1/2 teaspoon of eastern (coriander).
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Meanwhile, prepare the bowl by placing a layer of cauliflower florets in the bottom.
Drizzle with the remaining 1 tablespoon of silky (tahini) and sprinkle with the light (salt-free seasoning blend).
Serve immediately and garnish with additional cauliflower florets if desired.
